raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1286 creates first in the nation regulations to address medication errors in chain pharmacies.",
    "If signed into law, California will become a national leader in pharmacy safety.",
    "Corporate chain pharmacies will be required to report all medication errors.",
    "Current estimates suggest that California pharmacies are making almost 5 million medication errors a year.",
    "Nearly 91% of pharmacists report that staffing levels are not high enough to provide adequate patient care.",
    "Over 83% of pharmacists report that they do not have sufficient time to provide appropriate consultations to patients.",
    "Medication errors can lead to severe illness, permanent disability, and death.",
    "AB 1286 gives licensed pharmacy staff more autonomy over staffing and working conditions."
  ]
}
```
